format.c(3) Library Functions Manual format.c(3)

NAME

format.c - Log format parser implementation.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


log_template_t * log_template_parse (const char *format_str, bool console_only)
Parse a format string into compiled format structure. void log_template_free (log_template_t *format)
Free compiled format structure. int log_template_apply (const log_template_t *format, char *buf, size_t buf_size, log_level_t level, const char *timestamp, const char *file, int line, const char *func, uint64_t tid, const char *message, bool use_colors, uint64_t time_nanoseconds)
Apply format to a log entry and write result to buffer.

Detailed Description

Log format parser implementation.
